c.d: Average user rating on app stores, indicating overall user satisfaction.
Total number of times the app has been downloaded, reflecting its popularity.
Range and quality of photo effects and editing tools offered by the app.
User-friendliness and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
Availability of the app across different operating systems (iOS, Android, etc.).
Cost of the app, including any in-app purchases or subscription fees.
How often the app is updated, indicating ongoing support and feature improvements.
Presence of an active user community or social features within the app.
